calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-10-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production (Set One) And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-14-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DAVIN GAOIRAN'S Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production (Set One) And For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant Davin Gaorin's motion to compel responses to document requests and for monetary sanctions is denied without prejudice to filing a further motion contending that the discovery responses served by plaintiff Capital One, N.A. are inadequate. The court credits plaintiff's contention that it didn't receive or inadvertently misplaced the document requests till this motion was filed. Plaintiff has now served responses to the document requests. If defendant believes that those responses are inadequate, he should initiate a meet and confer and, if unsuccessful, he may file a motion seeking further responses.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admission (Set One) Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-14-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DAVIN GAOIRAN'S Motion To Deem Requests For Admission (Set One) Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant Davin Gaorin's motion to deem requests for admission admitted and for monetary sanctions is denied without prejudice to filing a further motion contending that the discovery responses served by plaintiff Capital One, N.A. are inadequate. The court credits plaintiff's contention that it didn't receive or inadvertently misplaced the requests for admission till this motion was filed.

Plaintiff has now served responses to the requests for admission. If defendant believes that those responses are inadequate, he should initiate a meet and confer and, if unsuccessful, he may file a motion seeking further responses.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories (Disc-004) And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-14-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DAVIN GAOIRAN'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories (Disc-004) And For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant Davin Gaorin's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and for monetary sanctions is denied without prejudice to filing a further motion contending that the discovery responses served by plaintiff Capital One, N.A. are inadequate. The court credits plaintiff's contention that it didn't receive or inadvertently misplaced the form interrogatories till this motion was filed. Plaintiff has now served responses to the form interrogatories. If defendant believes that those responses are inadequate, he should initiate a meet and confer and, if unsuccessful, he may file a motion seeking further responses.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
